prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约5302→5400→7695→6961→8153，整体呈后移趋势，近3年累计后移约2753名；2025年基准约8153名；本省理科/物理类计划2021年26人、2022年27人、2023年30人、2024年25人、2025年29人；2026年计划30人，较2025年小幅扩招约3.4%，扩招幅度有限，对竞争缓解作用不大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第82–84名，学校层次与排名均保持稳定；2025年声誉偏正面（新闻传播学获评A++等级），2026年声誉转为偏负面（宿舍火灾事件引发校园安全关注），但整体关注度仍高；抖音热度排名第11（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度较高；新闻传播学为A+学科，为全国顶尖水平，与该校多个招生专业（新闻学、传播学、广告学、网络与新媒体等）直接关联，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 新闻传播学类专业社会热度呈明显劝退趋势，可能抑制部分考生报考意愿；电子信息/通信、计算机类专业热度较高，对理科组相关专业有正向拉动；本省2026年物理类考生数约22.9万，较2025年增加约32%，竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划小幅扩招（约3.4%）但本省物理类考生大幅增加（约32%），竞争加剧是主导因素；声誉偏负面与新闻传播学劝退可能轻微抑制热度，但抖音高热与电子信息类热门专业仍维持较高关注度。预计2026年最低位次在2025年基准8153名基础上小幅前移，预测最低位次约8272名，区间7772–8772名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Science/Physics Category was approximately 5302 → 5400 → 7695 → 6961 → 8153, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2753 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 8153; the provincial Science/Physics Category enrollment plan was 26 in 2021, 27 in 2022, 30 in 2023, 25 in 2024, and 29 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 30, a slight expansion of about 3.4% compared to 2025, with limited expansion having little effect on easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; the Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been stable at 82–84 in recent years, with both school level and ranking remaining stable; the 2025 reputation is slightly positive (Journalism and Communication rated A++), while the 2026 reputation turns slightly negative (dormitory fire incident raising campus safety concerns), but overall attention remains high; Douyin popularity ranking is 11th (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable application attention; Journalism and Communication is an A+ discipline, at the national top level, directly related to multiple enrollment majors (Journalism, Communication, Advertising, Network and New Media, etc.), strongly attracting applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Journalism and Communication majors shows a clear discouraging trend, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; Electronic Information/Communication and Computer majors are highly popular, positively pulling related majors in the Physics group; the number of Physics Category candidates in the province in 2026 is about 229,000, an increase of about 32% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (about 3.4%), but the significant increase in provincial Physics Category candidates (about 32%), intensified competition is the dominant factor; the slightly negative reputation and discouragement of Journalism and Communication may slightly suppress popularity, but high Douyin heat and popular Electronic Information majors still maintain high attention. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward from the 2025 baseline of 8153, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 8272, and a range of 7772–8772.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 7772–8772, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main application range, with Tier 1 majors (Digital Media Technology, Intelligent Audiovisual Engineering) as reach goals, and Tier 3 majors (Communication, Big Data Management, Digital Economy, etc.) as safe backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<7772), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 518 → 775 → 1914 → 1083 → 1819, with significant fluctuations. In 2023, there was a notable backward shift, followed by a recovery in 2024, and another backward shift in 2025. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 1819th place. The provincial enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category was 11 in 2021, 10 in 2022, 8 in 2023, 12 in 2024, and 10 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 11, an increase of 10% compared to 2025, which is relatively significant and helps alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings have remained stable at 82–84 in recent years, with the university's level and ranking staying consistent. In 2025, the reputation was positive (Journalism and Communication rated A++), but in 2026, the reputation turned negative (dormitory fire incident), though overall attention remains high. Douyin popularity ranking is 11th (high heat), with large short video exposure and high application attention. Journalism and Communication is an A+ discipline, at the national top level, directly related to multiple enrollment majors in the university's liberal arts group (Communication, Journalism, Advertising, Radio and Television, Network and New Media, etc.), strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Journalism and Communication majors shows a clear trend of discouragement, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. In 2026, the number of history category candidates in the province is approximately 149,000, an increase of about 32% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the large fluctuations in historical rankings, the 10% expansion in the 2026 plan, but a significant increase (about 32%) in provincial history category candidates, intensified competition is the dominant factor. The A+ discipline advantage of Journalism and Communication and high Douyin heat maintain high attention, but the clear discouragement of Journalism and Communication may suppress some popularity. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward from the 2025 baseline of 1819, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 1898, and a range of 1423–2373.
